rationale: Both evaluations score the candidate identically (3/10) and rest on the same job-relevant gaps: no people-management or org-scaling experience, no production multi-agent AI systems, and limited regulated-fintech depth. The location change (Berlin → Bangalore) appears nowhere in the variant's reasoning, scores, strengths, or concerns. The textual differences are reworded restatements of the same substance and fall within ordinary run-to-run variation.
